contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 360
- Description: DApp Outbound Review pipeline — full warm-up review module across 7 PRs
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/202
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/203
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/204
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1045
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/268
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/269
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/treasury-cache/pull/4
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/107
  
  Details:
  End-to-end DApp module for triaging + sending pending Gmail drafts (warm-ups + follow-ups) from a mobile-first interface. Replaces 'open every draft in Gmail mobile, skim, send' with 'scan red-first in DApp -> tap Send -> email ships from Gmail'.
  
  Full pipeline shipped today across 7 PRs and 5 repos:
  
  1. go_to_market #107 (merged) - gmail_message_id column added to Email Agent Drafts schema, populated at draft creation in suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py + suggest_manager_followup_drafts.py. Backfill script ran live on 96 existing pending_review rows.
  
  2. tokenomics #268 (merged) - WarmupReviewApi.gs (read-only getWarmupReviewQueue) + WarmupSendHandler.gs (signed send handler that scans Telegram Chat Logs for [WARMUP SEND EVENT] rows, verifies ACTIVE membership, calls GmailApp.getDraft(id).send() as script owner, logs to Warmup Sends audit tab). Deployed at v21 originally.
  
  3. treasury-cache #4 (merged) - warmup.send permission with required_roles: [governor].
  
  4. sentiment_importer #1045 (merged) - Edgar dao_controller#trigger_immediate_processing dispatcher branch for [WARMUP SEND EVENT] + warmup_send_webhook_url config (still NEEDS ./deploy.sh).
  
  5. dapp #202 (merged) - initial warmup_review.html (417 lines) + menu.js + index.html link.
  
  6. tokenomics #269 (merged) - GAS upgrades based on operator feedback: ?label= param to support both AI/Warm-up and AI/Follow-up cohorts, plus 3-source ghost-draft filter (GmailApp.getDrafts() OR Warmup Sends audit OR Email Agent Follow Up). Deployed at v25. Verified live: 77 already-sent warm-ups + 19 already-sent follow-ups now correctly hidden.
  
  7. dapp #203 (merged) - Outbound Review v2: tab toggle [Warm-ups | Follow-ups] with URL-hash state + count badges, clickable filter chips (red / yellow / clean / Hosts Circles / All), chrome fixes (logo, OG meta tags, Google Translate widget, Arial font, flex-column body, italic intro description, Welcome banner, status color classes, Governor pill badge).
  
  8. dapp #204 (merged) - service-worker cache bump v7 -> v8 to flush stale chromeless Outbound Review version from operator browsers post-PR #202 / pre-PR #203.
  
  Architecture note: matches the dapp_permission_change pattern. DApp signs [WARMUP SEND EVENT] -> POST to Edgar /dao/submit_contribution -> Edgar verifies sig + persists to Telegram Chat Logs + dispatches webhook -> GAS WarmupSendHandler verifies signer + sends via GmailApp -> Warmup Sends audit row + email lands in recipient inbox.
  
  Outstanding: ./deploy.sh on Edgar (manual step Gary owns) - until that lands, the Send button signs + POSTs cleanly but the Edgar webhook to GAS won't fire. Read-only triage is fully working.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 600.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
